ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment item */,
  "total_quantity" INTEGER /* Total quantity available in inventory */,
  "mtu_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum technical unit quantity required for operational use */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost for the inventory of the item */,
  "mtu_cost" TEXT /* Cost per minimum technical unit */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider supplying the item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item (e.g., wattage, voltage) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "warranty_info" TEXT /* Warranty information for the item */,
  "installation_requirements" TEXT /* Installation requirements for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES inventory_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider from whom items are ordered */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Shipping cost for the order */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_orders" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales order */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date the sale occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "total_sales" TEXT /* Total sales revenue from the transaction */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being adjusted */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date the adjustment was made */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "adjusted_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity adjusted */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_adjustments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report in a structured format */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., inventory level, sales performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_tracking" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date the cost record was made */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost associated with the item */,
  "cost_type" TEXT /* Type of cost (e.g., purchase, operational) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_tracking_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_item_categories" (
  "item_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category assigned to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_categories_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES inventory_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "current_inventory" INTEGER /* Current inventory level at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_item_locations" (
  "item_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location */,
  "quantity_at_location" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item at the given location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_locations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES inventory_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item affected by the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_performance" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the supplier performance record */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider being evaluated */,
  "on_time_delivery_rate" TEXT /* Rate of on-time deliveries */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Quality rating of the supplier */,
  "communication_rating" TEXT /* Communication rating of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supplier_performance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)
